title: Incorrect results on joining with same table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE three (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), count INT NOT NULL CHECK (count >= 0));
SELECT t1.id, t1.name, t1.count, t2.id AS id2, t2.name AS name2 FROM three t1 LEFT JOIN three t2 ON t1.count = t2.id;
key_bug_features: Joining same table with alias on count column
